LineComment.Text: WFA revoir la gestion du Setpoint Safe en foncton de la shuttle
Gripper ready for Release (Release not used)
Fixture ready for Release (Release not used)
Axis ready for Release (Release not used)
Unload Gripper Closed according to dry run working mode
Load Gripper Closed according to dry run working mode
Axis V - Position Set point according to start request
Axis W - Position Set point according to start request
